overall.description: A nighttime walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city street in a video game. The scene features neon-lit skyscrapers, holographic advertisements, and wet reflective pavement. The camera follows a character initially, then continues down the sidewalk past pedestrians with umbrellas toward a large plaza with a cylindrical building covered in rotating digital billboards.

events.description: character in white jacket holding weapon moves left and exits frame
pedestrian with black umbrella passes close to camera on the left

agents.ego_description: walking down the wet sidewalk past a blue-lit food truck, passing pedestrians carrying umbrellas

notable_agents.action: character in white jacket holding a weapon walks left and exits the frame
pedestrian with black umbrella walking toward the camera

tall buildings covered in glowing neon advertisements and holographic displays
rain-soaked concrete sidewalk reflecting colorful neon lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy cyberpunk street at night, following a character in a white jacket who quickly exits left. The camera continues walking past a blue neon-lit food truck and pedestrians with umbrellas. Tall buildings covered in bright neon advertisements line the left side while the wet pavement reflects the colorful lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with digital signage

agents.ego_description: continuing steadily down the sidewalk past street furniture and digital signage poles

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red hair and black umbrella walking in the same direction

entered.detail: tall poles with attached digital displays and lighting fixtures
vertical poles with glowing green text displays showing data

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking down the wet sidewalk, leaving the food truck behind. Street light poles with digital displays line the right side while neon-covered buildings remain prominent on the left. Sparse pedestrians with umbrellas walk in opposing directions, and the rain continues to fall on the reflective pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban plaza with cylindrical holographic advertising structure

events.description: street opens into large plaza with massive cylindrical building featuring rotating ads
camera turns slightly left to circle around the cylindrical structure

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza toward and around the large cylindrical building covered in rotating holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in orange jacket walking along the plaza edge near the street

entered.detail: massive cylindrical structure with multiple levels of rotating holographic advertisements and bright screens
large floating circular billboard with bright animated advertisements suspended in the air
tall palm trees lining the edge of the plaza near the buildings

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a wide-open plaza featuring a massive cylindrical building covered in rotating holographic advertisements. The camera walks around this central structure, passing under floating holographic rings and palm trees. The environment opens up significantly with partial sky visibility between the towering structures, while the rain continues to create reflective surfaces on the tiled plaza ground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked cyberpunk street that gradually opens into a vast, holographic plaza. It begins by following a character in a white jacket who exits the frame, as the camera pushes past a blue neon-lit food truck and pedestrians with umbrellas under the glow of towering advertisements. As the camera continues down the wet sidewalk, the narrow corridor of digital street poles and neon buildings persists, with the reflective pavement mirroring the city's vibrant lights. The scene then expands into a wide-open plaza, shifting from the confined street to a spacious area dominated by a massive cylindrical building covered in rotating holographic advertisements. Finally, the camera glides around this central structure, passing under floating holographic rings and palm trees while the sky becomes partially visible between the surrounding skyscrapers.
